usage: vllm serve MODEL [options]

Pinned supported option surface from the vLLM 0.24 maintainer environment:
--served-model-name
--host
--port
--api-key
--max-model-len
--max-num-seqs
--seed
--dtype
--kv-cache-dtype
--mamba-cache-dtype
--mamba-ssm-cache-dtype
--quantization
--gpu-memory-utilization
--load-format
--tokenizer
--chat-template
--no-enable-prefix-caching
--no-enable-chunked-prefill
--generation-config
--tensor-parallel-size
--disable-log-requests
